qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t1.oi_personal_emp as B_oi_personal_emp, t1.e_numero_legajo as B_e_numero_legajo, SEC.policy, t1.e_numero_legajo as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, t1.oi_empresa as B_oi_empresa, t1.oi_personal as B_oi_personal FROM MED04_PERSONAL as t0,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_personal_emp,t1.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id , t1.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t1.oi_personal_emp as B_oi_personal_emp, SEC.policy FROM MED04_PERSONAL as t0,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t1,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp RIGHT OUTER t1.oi_personal_emp,t1.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LegajoMedicina.PERSONAL_EMP.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select MED04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp as ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as DES from MED04_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join MED04_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL_EMP inner PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL_EMP , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LegajoMedicina.PERSONAL_EMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from MED04_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join MED04_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL_EMP inner PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL_EMP , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per FROM PER02_LICEN_PER WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio = {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED04_HIST_CLINICA.oi_consulta_per) as CNT from MED04_HIST_CLINICA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED04_HIST_CLINICA.f_fechahora_cons,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED04_HIST_CLINICA.f_fechahora_cons,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and MED04_HIST_CLINICA.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

(#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and MED04_MEDIC_SUMIN.oi_consulta_per={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
